**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Yihuang Intelligent Technology Co., Ltd. presents a typical phenomenon of a misaligned label: 'acting as a general merchandise proxy under the guise of technology.' The system has executed forced purification, removing the false underlying data regarding the Apple Inc. consumer electronics empire. Officials listed it under the high-end 'Computer, Communication and Other Electronic Equipment Manufacturing - Electronic Device Manufacturing.' However, the forensic engine swiftly shot it down through multidimensional data cross-referencing: the paid-in capital is only 675,000 RMB, the insured headcount is 7, and the registered address is located in the Xuzhuang Software Park, Xuanwu District (No. 56 Lingzhi Road). Within a software park, relying on a mere few hundred thousand in funds and single-digit employees, it fundamentally cannot support the 'computer software and hardware and peripheral equipment manufacturing' and 'IoT equipment manufacturing' claimed in its license. Even more comically, the latter half of its lengthy business license exposes its true commercial true colors: from 'acquisition of primary agricultural products, wholesale of edible agricultural products' to 'building materials, metal materials, chemical products,' and then to 'fan sales, home appliance sales.' Diagnostic conclusion: this is absolutely not a high-tech electronics manufacturing plant, but a hodgepodge General Trading Agency affiliated within a software park, cloaked in 'AI/IoT.' Its true purpose is to be able to smoothly issue invoices in various miscellaneous procurement bids (ranging from agricultural products to building materials and home appliances), possessing absolutely no physical manufacturing capability.
